steps.title: Scale the per-acre maximum to 2 acres
steps.content:
The maximum is 124 trees per acre. To find the maximum on 2 acres, multiply:
$$124 \text{ trees/acre} \times 2 \text{ acres} = 248 \text{ trees}$$
That matches Choice C — 248.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, compare the result from the work to the answer choices. The value, equation, or condition found above matches Choice C — 248, 248, and the other choices fail the same setup or substitution. Therefore C.
